title: Lomelosia kurdica
taxonomy: Lomelosia kurdica is a species within the family Dipsacaceae. It belongs to the genus Lomelosia. Lomelosia kurdica is a flowering plant, and its classification is part of the broader taxonomic group known as angiosperms. Lomelosia kurdica is further classified as a member of the order Dipsacales. This classification helps to understand the plant's evolutionary relationships and characteristics.
